comment: Complete art kit. Part 1 (core cast) is DONE — all six were regenerated and merged. Part 2 covers every variant enemy that still shares a core sprite: generate any subset, name the file as listed, and the import pipeline (scripts/import_art.py) plus a spriteId wiring change brings each one in. Generate in the listed order if doing a partial batch — bosses and high-frequency enemies first.
house_style_suffix: Clean white or transparent background, cel-shaded with soft gradients and crisp black outlines. Pokémon-meets-corporate art style, chibi-leaning proportions with slightly oversized head and expressive eyes, character sheet quality, same style and proportions as the other characters from this game.

variants.name: The Founder
variants.prompt: Startup founder final-act boss: man in a grey hoodie under an expensive blazer, smug visionary expression, one hand raised mid-grand-gesture, the other holding a phone showing a rocket-ship graph.

variants.name: The Chief of Staff
variants.prompt: Immaculately dressed gatekeeper with a discreet earpiece and a tablet clutched to her chest, other palm out in a firm 'stop right there' gesture, polite but immovable expression.

variants.name: The IPO
variants.prompt: Exuberant trader-suited figure ringing a golden opening bell, ticker-tape confetti around the shoulders, a rising stock-chart sash across the chest, manic grin.

variants.name: The Rival CEO
variants.prompt: Rival chief executive in a sharply contrasting charcoal-and-burgundy suit, arms spread in mock welcome, competitor's product in one hand, taunting smirk.

variants.name: The Activist Investor
variants.prompt: Aggressive investor brandishing a stock certificate stamped 12% and an open letter to the board, hungry grin, loosened designer tie.

variants.name: The M&A Shark
variants.prompt: Predatory dealmaker in a sharkskin-grey suit, holding out a contract and a fountain pen, wide toothy smile with slightly sharp canines, narrow eyes.

variants.name: The PE Partner
variants.prompt: Private-equity partner in a fleece vest over a dress shirt, calculator in one hand, binder labeled 'SYNERGIES' under the arm, cold appraising smile.

variants.name: The Board Member
variants.prompt: Patrician older executive in pinstripes, leather portfolio under one arm, lowering reading glasses to peer down skeptically with one raised eyebrow.

variants.name: The Board Observer
variants.prompt: Quiet suited figure standing half-turned, small notepad and pen in hand, unreadable neutral expression — the person in the room who never speaks but writes everything down.

variants.name: The SEC Investigator
variants.prompt: Federal investigator in a boxy government suit holding up a badge in one hand and a subpoena document in the other, completely humorless stare.

variants.name: The Micromanager
variants.prompt: Anxious manager leaning forward over a tiny laptop showing a packed calendar, stopwatch in the other hand, peering over glasses with an 'everything okay?' smile.

variants.name: The Credit Thief
variants.prompt: Sneaky colleague hugging a trophy and someone else's presentation board, one finger raised to lips, shifty sideways grin.

variants.name: The Data Tyrant
variants.prompt: Imperious executive jabbing a finger at a tablet glowing with red declining charts, other fist on hip, demanding scowl.

variants.name: The Compliance Officer
variants.prompt: Stern officer hugging a massive three-ring policy binder, big red VIOLATION stamp in the free hand, light glinting off rectangular glasses.

variants.name: The Scope Creeper
variants.prompt: Over-friendly product type leaning in too close, index finger raised for 'just one more thing', an unrolled requirements scroll spilling from the other hand to the floor.

variants.name: The Ghosting Recruiter
variants.prompt: Pale, washed-out recruiter in a blazer already half-turned to leave, glancing back at his phone, giving a vague noncommittal wave.

variants.name: The Coffee Runner
variants.prompt: Frantic intern mid-dash balancing a precarious carrier tray of four coffee cups, lanyard flying, panicked-but-determined face.

variants.name: The Town Hall Heckler
variants.prompt: Employee standing on an office chair with one hand raised high and a microphone in the other, 'this is more of a comment than a question' smugness.

variants.name: The OKR Fanatic
variants.prompt: Wild-eyed evangelist beside a flip chart covered in cascading arrows and percentages, marker brandished like a sword, zealous grin.

variants.name: The Offsite Facilitator
variants.prompt: Relentlessly cheerful facilitator in a branded polo and lanyard, giant sticky-note pad in one arm, other arm spread wide for a trust fall.

variants.name: The Cross-Functional Blocker
variants.prompt: Immovable middle-aged process guy standing arms-crossed in front of a Gantt chart, a red BLOCKED stamp hanging from his belt.

variants.name: The Reorg Survivor
variants.prompt: Frazzled veteran holding a cardboard box of desk belongings, name badge with three crossed-out titles taped over each other, thousand-yard stare.

variants.name: The Headcount Freeze
variants.prompt: Gloomy finance figure dusted in frost, icy blue palette, holding a frozen-solid org chart, breath visible.

variants.name: The Budget Gatekeeper
variants.prompt: Finance executive holding a giant red DENIED stamp and a padlocked ledger, chin up, daring anyone to ask.

variants.name: The Skip-Level Politician
variants.prompt: Slick climber whispering behind one cupped hand, the other holding an org chart with an arrow skipping a level upward, conspiratorial smile.

variants.name: The Strategy Consultant
variants.prompt: Immaculate consultant presenting a 2x2 matrix slide with a laser pointer, insufferably confident smile.

variants.name: The Consultant
variants.prompt: Road-warrior consultant with a rolling suitcase, airport lanyard, binder labeled RECOMMENDATIONS under one arm, checking an expensive watch — the meter is running.

variants.name: Head of HR
variants.prompt: Warmly menacing HR chief holding a party hat labeled FUN in one hand and a manila folder labeled PIP in the other, wide unblinking smile.

variants.name: The Regulatory Auditor
variants.prompt: Grey-suited auditor examining a stack of filings through a magnifying glass, checklist clipboard tucked under the arm.

variants.name: The Agency Creative
variants.prompt: Flamboyant creative director in a black turtleneck and designer glasses, presenting a mood board with a dramatic flourish.

variants.name: The PR Crisis
variants.prompt: Panicked comms person with a buzzing phone in each hand, notification flames rising from both screens, loosened tie, single sweat drop.

variants.name: The Whistleblower
variants.prompt: Figure in a trench coat over office clothes, literal silver whistle around the neck, clutching a manila envelope stamped CONFIDENTIAL, glancing over one shoulder.

phase2_optional.name: The Founder (Pivoting)
phase2_optional.prompt: The same hoodie-under-blazer founder but disheveled and manic: hair wild, blazer off one shoulder, phone now showing a crashing graph, desperate grin.

phase2_optional.name: The Chief of Staff (Unleashed)
phase2_optional.prompt: The same chief of staff with the earpiece ripped out, hair loose, tablet crackling with energy, gloves-off furious focus.

phase2_optional.name: The Market Correction
phase2_optional.prompt: Ominous suited figure whose silhouette is woven from plunging red candlestick charts, bell now cracked, cold empty smile.
